span.p:
DNS Issue
→ dig +trace
→ Check NS records
→ Verify /etc/resolv.conf

display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Connection Issue
→ telnet host port
→ Check firewall/SG
→ Check port listening

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
TLS Issue
→ openssl s_client
→ Check cert expiry
→ Verify TLS version
→ Check OCSP

span.p:
Timeout Issue
→ curl timing breakdown
→ Check server health
→ Check LB health checks

span.p:
Latency Issue
→ mtr for path analysis
→ curl timing phases
→ Check packet loss
→ Check congestion

Application Error
→ Check response body
→ Check server logs
→ Check upstream deps
